access_token.description: Auth0 Management API access token, used directly as a Bearer token; never logged. This is the only auth mode this bundle implements — see docs.md's Known limits for the M2M client-credentials gap.

base_url.description: Auth0 tenant domain, e.g. https://your-tenant.us.auth0.com. No default: legacy also requires this explicitly (the base is tenant-specific, never a fixed literal).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
